site.name: Oneshot Gallery
site.tagline: Full-page designs you can actually ship.
site.description: An open-source gallery of art-directed full-page frontend designs. Every entry ships a live demo, the complete source code, and the reproducible AI prompt behind it.

home.trifectaEn: live demo · full source · the prompt behind it

home.installHint: Install any design with one command
home.wallAria: The index wall — every entry in the annex
home.howStep1: browse — every entry is a live, full-page demo
home.howStep2: copy or install — full source, one command
home.howStep3: remix — the exact prompt ships with it

about.title: About · 소개
about.metaDescription: Why Oneshot Gallery exists: live demos, complete source, and honest, reproducible AI prompts — free under MIT.
